description_long: This is a modern digital piano with a sleek black finish, featuring a full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys. The piano is supported by two sturdy side legs and includes a single sustain pedal connected by a cable beneath the keyboard. On top of the keyboard, there is a control panel with various buttons, a display screen, and rotary knobs, suggesting advanced digital functionality. A music stand is mounted at the back of the keyboard, designed to hold sheet music or a tablet. The rear of the piano is enclosed, and the overall design is compact yet robust, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with a professional and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A sleek black digital piano with a full keyboard, control panel, single pedal, and an integrated music stand. The design is modern, compact, and visually polished.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, control panel, music stand, and the single pedal beneath.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the piano, the thickness of the keyboard section, and the side profile of the music stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel, the music stand from behind, and the pedal cable.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the keyboard's length and the side of the control panel.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full-sized keyboard with alternating white and black keys, no missing or non-standard keys visible.
